message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'psmgr_setsockopt' sets signal field 'psmgr_proc_ctx.xfrm_type', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=psmgr_proc_ctx;field=xfrm_type;offset=0] [oracle:assert=psmgr_proc_ctx.xfrm_type stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets xfrm_type without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
